title: Aditya Birla & TOI Groups, Bolt Ventures and Blackstone acquire RCB for $1.8bn
content: A consortium including Aditya Birla Group, The Times of India Group, Bolt Ventures, and Blackstone has agreed to acquire Royal Challengers Bengaluru for $1.78 billion. The deal, subject to regulatory approvals, will see Aryaman Vikram Birla as chairman and Satyan Gajwani as vice-chairman post-IPL 2026. This acquisition makes RCB the most valuable IPL franchise to date.

title: Trump dials PM Modi as US contemplates peace talks with Iran
content: President Trump and PM Modi discussed the West Asia situation, emphasizing the critical need to keep the Strait of Hormuz open and secure. Modi reiterated India's support for de-escalation and peace, highlighting the importance of safe passage for global stability and economic well-being.

title: SRH playing XI for IPL 2026: Ishan to lead, who will fill Pat Cummins void?
content: Sunrisers Hyderabad kicks off IPL 2026 against RCB on March 28. Following a strong 2024 and a disappointing 2025, SRH aims for redemption with a revamped squad. Ishan Kishan will captain initially in Pat Cummins' absence. Key players like Travis Head and Heinrich Klaasen are set to feature prominently.

title: Pichai on ChatGPT shock: CEO recalls ‘Code Red’ after debut; says push led to Gemini 3
content: Google CEO Sundar Pichai revealed his "uncomfortably exciting" reaction to ChatGPT's 2022 launch, admitting the speed of AI diffusion surprised even his "AI-first" company. This prompted a 'Code Red' that ultimately led to the development of Gemini 3, now outperforming rivals. Pichai emphasized Google's quiet, full-stack innovation approach, building necessary infrastructure before product release.

title: ITC, Tata Power & more: Top stocks to watch for today
content: Analysts are bullish on Fractal Analytics and Tata Power, citing strong growth prospects and positive developments. UBS maintains a buy on ITC, expecting it to beat expectations despite pricing strategy impacts. However, Nuvama and Kotak Institutional Equities express caution on Coal India and Power Grid Corp, respectively, due to potential headwinds and saturated valuations.

title: 30-year-old actor Harshil Kalia dies after car hits divider, overturns
content: A 30-year-old woman, Harshil Kalia, died in a late-night road accident in Jaipur's Mansarovar area. Her car lost control, hit a divider, and overturned near the Nagar Nigam office on Shipra Path. She sustained severe head injuries and was declared dead at Jaipuria Hospital.

title: ‘Dhurandhar: The Revenge’ box office collection: Film eyes Rs 1,000 crore globally
content: Ranveer Singh's 'Dhurandhar: The Revenge' is making waves at the box office, nearing Rs 600 crore net domestically within its first week. The film experienced a strong opening and weekend, with day 6 collections showing a slight dip but still contributing to impressive overall figures. Worldwide collections are projected to reach Rs 1,000 crore.

title: H-1B visa registrations dip 30-50%: List of cos emerging as ‘favourites’ in new system
content: H-1B visa registrations for FY27 have plummeted by 30-50%, driven by higher fees and a new lottery prioritizing wages. This shift benefits mid-tier IT firms and US Master's graduates, while large outsourcing companies face reduced dominance. The recalibration signals a move towards quality talent and increased costs for employers.

title: Scheduled caste status only for Hindus, Buddhists, Sikhs: SC
content: The Supreme Court ruled that only individuals professing Hinduism, Sikhism, or Buddhism can be members of Scheduled Castes. Conversion to any other religion results in an absolute loss of SC status, preventing invocation of the SC/ST Act. This ruling contrasts with Scheduled Tribes, where religion is not a basis for exclusion.

title: Rs 18.9cr on extras, flawed bidding: What CAG flagged in Kejriwal’s ‘Sheesh Mahal’ facelift
content: A CAG report revealed significant cost overruns and procedural lapses in renovating Arvind Kejriwal's former residence, escalating from ₹8.6 crore to ₹33.6 crore. The audit highlighted inflated costs for luxury additions, restricted bidding, and work awarded without fresh tenders. A separate staff block project also faced fund diversion and incompletion.

title: Study lessons from West Asia conflict to improve India’s def preparedness: Rajnath
content: Defence Minister Rajnath Singh convened a high-level meeting to assess the West Asia crisis's impact on India's security. He stressed learning from the conflict to bolster defence preparedness, emphasizing a decade-long roadmap for integrated defence, self-reliance, and operational readiness. The meeting also reviewed supply chain resilience for defence equipment.

title: 100 Days With Neuralink N1: paralysed gamer hails thought control; trial hints at new independence
content: Noland Arbaugh, the first recipient of Neuralink's N1 implant, celebrated 100 days with the device. Paralyzed since 2016, he now controls a MacBook and plays World of Warcraft using only his thoughts. Arbaugh describes the experience as life-changing, enabling a new level of independence and interaction.

title: Ex-Pak cricketer Imran Khan alleges 'inhumane treatment' of wife to 'blackmail' him
content: The remarks came during a phone call with his son Kasim Khan over the Eid weekend. Kasim later shared details of the conversation publicly after speaking to his father over the weekend.

title: Harish Rana, first to be allowed passive euthanasia in India, dies
content: Harish Rana, India's first patient granted passive euthanasia by the Supreme Court, has passed away at AIIMS after 13 years in a vegetative state. His death followed the withdrawal of life support, a decision made to uphold his right to die with dignity.  Rana's family, who donated his corneas and heart valves, found comfort in his peaceful end.

title: 'Ustaad Bhagat Singh' BO day 7: Film reaches Rs 86.47 Cr worldwide
content: Pawan Kalyan's 'Ustaad Bhagat Singh' has garnered Rs 86.47 crore worldwide in its first week, despite mixed reviews and a challenging release window. While the weekend saw moderate collections, weekday figures experienced a sharp decline. Director Harish Shankar acknowledged the film's performance, attributing it to release strategy and competition, emphasizing effort over outcome.

title: Dayton Webber gun video surfaces in Bradrick Wells murder case
content: Dayton James Webber, a quadruple amputee cornhole player, has been accused of killing Bradrick Michael Wells during an argument in Maryland. Police say he acted alone and later fled. Videos showing him firing guns have surfaced online. He is now in custody and awaiting extradition. The American Cornhole League has called the situation serious and ongoing.

title: Mayweather vs Pacquiao rematch set to break $600M record in Las Vegas
content: The rematch between Floyd Mayweather Jr and Manny Pacquiao is already generating huge excitement ahead of its planned date on September 19 in Las Vegas. That original “Fight of the Century” still stands as one of the most profitable events in boxing history. Now, with both superstars stepping back into the ring, promoters are aiming to deliver an even grander spectacle.

title: Megan Thee Stallion opens up on feeling like a burden amid Klay Thompson romance
content: Megan Thee Stallion, the six time Grammy winner, has turned heads with her high profile relationship with the Dallas Mavericks’ star player, Klay Thompson. As fans root for an engagement announcement, Megan Thee Stallion's heartbreaking statements about feeling "too much" have sparked chaos and made fans emotional over the pain she has gone through in her life before she met the NBA legend.

title: Middle East crisis: PM Modi sets up 7 empowered groups to assess impact of war
content: Prime Minister Narendra Modi announced the formation of seven empowered groups to assess the impact of the West Asian conflict on India's energy supplies, essential commodities, and supply chains. These quick-response teams will develop strategies to mitigate economic repercussions, drawing lessons from the Covid-19 pandemic playbook.

title: Two-year ban, zero earnings: The cost of Ben Duckett's IPL pullout
content: Ben Duckett’s late withdrawal from the Indian Premier League 2026 could come at a significant cost, with the England batter facing a potential two-season ban under league rules.

title: Aditya Birla Group, TOI Group, Bolt Ventures & Blackstone acquire RCB for $1.78 billion
content: A consortium including Aditya Birla Group, Times of India, Bolt Ventures, and Blackstone has acquired Royal Challengers Bengaluru (RCB) for $1.78 billion. This landmark deal encompasses both the men's and women's IPL and WPL franchises from United Spirits. Aryaman Vikram Birla will chair the team, with Satyan Gajwani as vice-chairman, following the 2026 IPL season.

title: 5 India-flagged LPG-loaded tankers stuck at Hormuz
content: India's government confirmed five LPG tankers, carrying approximately 2.3 lakh tonnes of cooking gas, are positioned west of the Strait of Hormuz. Two ships are expected at Indian ports this week. Officials clarified that no special permission is required for vessels to transit the international strait, though safety assessments are crucial given the current geopolitical climate.

title: In Rajya Sabha, PM Modi warns of prolonged disruption
content: Prime Minister Modi has cautioned about a prolonged disruption stemming from the West Asia conflict. He stated this crisis will be a major test for India, potentially leading to an energy crisis and serious global economic consequences.

title: Chinook deploys Army’s heavy-duty assault bridge along western sector
content: Indian Army and Air Force have successfully deployed a pontoon assault bridge using a Chinook helicopter. This joint exercise showcased seamless coordination and enhanced battlefield mobility. The capability allows swift river crossing, crucial for offensive operations and disaster relief. The versatile Chinook helicopter played a key role in this rapid deployment.

title: EC meets state officials, focuses on sealing borders
content: Election Commission convened with top officials from poll-bound states and their neighbors to bolster election preparedness. The focus was on ensuring peaceful polls by strengthening border security and curbing illegal activities like cash, liquor, and drug smuggling.  All agencies were directed to maintain heightened vigilance to prevent violence and inducements.

title: No one country can ensure balance of power in Asia, India’s role indispensable: US official
content: The US is shifting its India strategy towards a pragmatic, interest-driven approach, emphasizing strength and collaboration for Indo-Pacific stability.  Undersecretary Elbridge Colby highlighted India's crucial role as a "waxing power," suggesting a move away from idealistic notions towards realistic geopolitical partnerships.  This focus on shared security outcomes and burden-sharing signals a more transactional engagement.

title: Who is Frances Tiafoe's girlfriend Ayan Broomfield? Tennis star who stayed through his rise
content: Frances Tiafoe and Ayan Broomfield have been together since 2015, growing through every stage of life and tennis. While Tiafoe rises in global rankings, Broomfield has her own strong background in college and professional tennis. From big wins to personal moments, their relationship shows steady support, long-term commitment, and a journey built on trust and shared dreams.

title: SC rejects plea for separate enumeration of denotified, nomadic & semi-nomadic tribes
content: The Supreme Court expressed disapproval of a PIL requesting separate enumeration of Denotified, Nomadic, and Semi-Nomadic Tribes in the upcoming census. The bench suggested the petition's motive might be to gain SC/ST status, calling such moves "calculated" and potentially aimed at dividing India.  Despite recommendations for enumeration since 2000, the government has not acted.

title: Civils '25: OBCs pip EWS despite interview drag
content: In a shift from previous trends, Other Backward Classes (OBC) candidates outperformed Economically Weaker Sections (EWS) in the 2025 Civil Service Examinations final merit list. Despite lower interview scores, OBCs' strong performance in written exams secured them a higher overall cut-off than EWS, reversing a recent pattern.

title: SC: Trials in UAPA cases must be completed in 1 year
content: The Supreme Court mandated that UAPA cases investigated by the NIA must conclude within a year through exclusive special courts. States must identify court needs and appoint dedicated prosecutors. The Centre offers funding for these courts, aiming to expedite trials and address bail concerns. Delhi leads in pending NIA cases.

title: SC grants full pension to women denied permanent commission
content: The Supreme Court has ordered the armed forces to pay full pension to hundreds of women short service commission officers whose permanent commission was unfairly denied due to arbitrary ACR assessments.

title: Gujarat government plans India’s third spaceport near Gir Somnath
content: India is set to establish its third satellite launch centre in Gujarat, with a site identified near Gir Somnath district. This move, following consultations with IN-SPACe, aims to bolster the nation's growing space sector. Gujarat is also developing a space park and a private satellite manufacturing plant, positioning the state as a key hub.

title: Pakistan to mediate Iran-US talks? Trump reposts PM Shehbaz Sharif's tweet
content: Pakistan has offered to host talks between the United States and Iran to end the ongoing conflict. Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif expressed Islamabad's readiness to facilitate these discussions. President Donald Trump shared Sharif's post, fueling speculation about potential backchannel diplomacy. Reports suggest Pakistan is leveraging its ties to act as a neutral venue.

title: Horoscope today: Daily astrological predictions
content: Horoscope Today: Read daily horoscope predictions for March 25, 2026. Know all about the astrological events and influences that will be affecting each of the 12 zodiac signs. Our astrologer has analyzed the movements of the planets and the alignment of the stars to bring you the most accurate and up-to-date horoscope predictions for the day ahead. Get ready to discover what the stars have in store for you today.

title: RCB's valuation increases by a staggering 1495 percent in 18 years
content: Vijay Mallya's initial purchase of Royal Challengers Bengaluru for $111.6 million was driven by brand promotion, not cricket passion.  Now, after an 18-year journey under Diageo's ownership and a name change to Royal Challengers Bengaluru, the franchise has been sold for a staggering $1.78 billion, marking a colossal 1495% value increase.

title: 'Eye for a head': Iran threatens US, sets tough conditions for ending war
content: Iran issued a severe warning to Donald Trump, stating that any attack on its infrastructure would result in an "eye for a head" response, potentially paralyzing America. Tehran has hardened its negotiating stance, demanding an end to the war, guarantees against future military action, compensation, and control of the Strait of Hormuz before considering peace talks.

title: IPL 2026: Josh Hazelwood to join RCB squad when 'Cricket Australia are happy'
content: RCB director of cricket Mo Bobat said on Tuesday that the franchise is working closely with Cricket Australia and medical staff as Hazlewood continues his recovery in Australia.

title: RCB players to wear jersey no. 11 in 'memory' of stampede victims
content: The decision was taken to honour the fans who died in the stampede during the franchise's celebration of the maiden title win on June 4 last year at Bengaluru's Chinnaswamy Stadium.

title: Is Saudi Arabia calling the shots? Crown Prince MBS urging Trump to keep Iran war alive - report
content: Saudi Crown Prince Mohammed bin Salman is reportedly urging US President Trump to escalate military action against Iran, viewing it as a chance to reshape the Middle East.  He believes removing Iran's current government is key to addressing the threat to Gulf nations.  However, Riyadh officially denies pushing for war, emphasizing a peaceful resolution and self-defense against Iranian attacks.

title: Taliban frees American academic Dennis Coyle after more than a year in detention
content: American academic Dennis Coyle, detained for over a year in Afghanistan, has been released by Taliban authorities on humanitarian grounds coinciding with Eid al-Fitr. While Washington welcomes this positive step, it renews calls for the return of other Americans still believed to be held, emphasizing an end to 'hostage diplomacy'.

title: KKR retire Andre Russell's No. 12 jersey - Here is why
content: At a preseason event in Kolkata, KKR retired Andre Russell’s No. 12 jersey, honouring his impact and loyalty. Despite past exit rumours, he stayed committed and now takes on a Power Coach role. Russell reflected emotionally on his career, saying he “left everything on the field.” Meanwhile, Rinku Singh was named vice-captain under Ajinkya Rahane for the new season.

title: Who's next at UNC? Potential candidates to replace Hubert Davis, their priorities
content: Hubert Davis is out after five seasons in Chapel Hill. Here are names expected to be on the short list.

title: UNC fires coach Davis after early tourney exit
content: North Carolina head men's basketball coach Hubert Davis was fired by the school after another early exit in the NCAA tournament.

title: L.A. spoils Tiger's return, cruises to TGL title
content: Tiger Woods competed for the first time in more than a year and that wasn't nearly enough to stop Los Angeles Golf Club, which made three straight eagles to close out a 9-2 victory in the TGL finals Tuesday night to capture the SoFi Cup.

title: Elite longevity: Flacco, 41, agrees to Cincy deal
content: Quarterback Joe Flacco is coming back for a 19th NFL season, agreeing to a one-year, $6 million deal with the Bengals, sources told ESPN's Jeremy Fowler.

title: Sources: Crow-Armstrong deal for 6 years, $115M
content: Pete Crow-Armstrong's new contract extension with the Chicago Cubs is for six years and $115 million, sources told ESPN's Jeff Passan on Tuesday.

title: NBA players' union calls for 65-game rule change
content: The NBPA is calling on the league to, at minimum, amend the 65-game rule for players to be eligible for end-of-season awards.

title: Florida hoping to ink Golden to third extension
content: Florida is aiming to sign coach Todd Golden to a third contract extension in as many years, while heading off potential interest from schools with open head coaching jobs.

title: Thomas sues White Sox for using name on jersey
content: Hall of Famer Frank Thomas has filed a lawsuit against the White Sox, alleging unauthorized use of his likeness on City Connect 2.0 uniforms last season.

title: House passes Ali Revival Act; bill heads to Senate
content: The Muhammad Ali Boxing Revival Act, which would shift the structure of pro boxing by allowing Unified Boxing Organizations as options for boxers, passed the U.S. House of Representatives by a voice vote Tuesday.

title: ⚾ Fantasy baseball draft guide: Rankings, more
content: All the rankings, projections, cheat sheets, strategy and analysis you need for the 2026 fantasy baseball season.

content: Whether your club enters Opening Day as the team to beat or hoping to be 2026's biggest surprise, we've got you covered.

content: Field Yates unveils his latest NFL mock draft, projecting two full rounds. Which top prospects could go in the opening 64 picks?

content: After learning how to kick and teaching himself English, Kansei Matsuzawa's dream is nearing reality.

title: The trade that wasn't: Inside the Maxx Crosby saga between the Raiders, Ravens
content: We talked to people about the Maxx Crosby trade situation to find out what really went down between Baltimore and Las Vegas.

title: What's next for Florida, Kansas, Kentucky, UNC: Recruits, transfer portal, more
content: Their NCAA tournament runs ended early and now it's all about next season. Here's how it's taking shape.

title: UConn star Azzi Fudd and the family behind her final March
content: Azzi Fudd's "imperfectly perfect" family has been her rock through ACL tears, dog food pranks and Beyoncé on repeat. Now they're hoping for one more NCAA tournament title for UConn.

content: Which 2026 NBA draft prospects helped or hurt their stock after an exciting first weekend during March Madness?

content: Can Phoenix make up ground in the West standings? Plus, updated playoff projections, draft lottery standings.

content: Six Big Ten teams! Upset-minded Texas! Buzzer-beaters and blowouts! Here's how the Sweet 16 teams stack up.

title: Ranking the remaining 16 teams in the women's NCAA tournament
content: Six SEC teams and five from the ACC (including a 10-seed!) help make up the Sweet 16. Here's how they stack up.

title: Robot umps in MLB? What to know about new balls-and-strikes challenge system
content: Baseball's next big rule change is here. Here is how automated ball-strike challenges will shape the 2026 season.

title: NHL playoff watch: What's at stake in all 15 games Tuesday
content: With 30 teams in action, the playoff picture will shift Tuesday night. Here's what to watch for specifically.

title: Salah's exit felt inevitable and then inconceivable: Examining Liverpool's huge loss
content: It's hard to imagine Liverpool without Mohamed Salah, but all good things must come to an end. Could his farewell include an FA Cup or Champions League trophy?

title: Arsenal teach Chelsea a Champions League lesson in clinical finishing
content: Arsenal will head into the second leg of their UWCL quarterfinal against Chelsea with a commanding 3-1 lead thanks to some lethal finishing from Stina Blackstenius, Chloe Kelly and Alessia Russo.

title: NWSL Power Rankings: Angel City, Dash on the rise but Thorns still on top
content: Angel City and the Houston Dash are quickly making their way to the top of ESPN's NWSL Power Rankings, but their rise isn't enough to make them No. 1.

title: Feeling lucky? What turnovers and late-game success say about 2026
content: Some 2025 teams couldn't get a break. Others, such as Indiana, had luck and success. What changes in 2026?

title: How Jaxon Smith-Njigba's contract extension impacts Seahawks, Rams' Puka Nacua
content: Answering five questions about the record-breaking contract extension for the NFL's top receiver in 2025.

title: Women's tournament: UConn still title favorite as Virginia upset shakes up the odds
content: Odds for each team to advance through the bracket and to win the 2026 women's college basketball championship.

title: Inside Iran's "Very Big" Hormuz-Related Oil And Gas "Present" For Trump
content: Asked if it was related to the Strait of Hormuz-- a key oil shipping channel through which roughly one-fifth of global oil supply passes-- Trump answered affirmatively.

title: US-Israel-Iran War Live Updates: US Sends 15-Point Plan To Iran To End War, Reopen Strait Of Hormuz: Report
content: US President Donald Trump threatened to "obliterate" Iran's power plants if Tehran does not reopen the Strait of Hormuz for shipping traffic.

title: "Trump Is Transactional, Doesn't Think Strategically": Former US NSA
content: Iran War: Former National Security Advisor of the United States, John Bolton, said that US President Donald Trump is buying time to see if Iran is ready for talks.

title: "We Have Won This, Militarily They Are Dead": Trump On Iran War
content: US President Donald Trump said that the US has won the war, adding that Iran's navy and air force have been completely decimated.

title: Meta Ordered To Pay $375 Million Over Child Exploitation, User Safety Claims
content: A New Mexico jury on Tuesday found social media giant Meta liable for endangering children by making them vulnerable to predators on its platforms and other dangers.

title: US Sends Iran A 15-Point Plan To End War: Report
content: The New York Times, quoting two anonymous officials, said that the proposal was sent to Iran via Pakistan, which has offered to mediate.

title: US In Negotiations With Iran "Right Now", Tehran Badly Wants Deal: Trump
content: President Donald Trump on Tuesday said the United States was talking to "the right people" in Iran in order to reach an agreement to end hostilities.

title: Iran Says US, Israel Attacked Its Nuclear Facility Again
content: Iran War: Iran's atomic energy organisation accused the US and Israel on Tuesday of attacking its Bushehr nuclear power plant.

title: Iran Says "Non-Hostile" Ships Can Transit Strait Of Hormuz: Report
content: Iran War: Tehran said in the letter that vessels linked to the US and Israel, as well as "other participants in the aggression, do not qualify for innocent or non-hostile passage," the FT said.

title: US To Send 3,000 Troops From Elite Army Brigade To Middle East: Report
content: The United States is planning to send some 3,000 soldiers from the elite 82nd Airborne Division to the Middle East to support operations against Iran.

title: Man Beats Dog To Death, Locals Attack NGO Workers For Trying To Save It
content: According to the NGO members, the incident occurred when they visited the area after a man allegedly beat a dog to death.

title: 'Iran Will Welcome US Troops, It's Easier To Hit Soldiers On Ground': Scholar
content: Iranian scholar Foad Izadi suggested Tehran could implement a transit fee for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz to recoup losses. "People who don't like the transit fee, they can maybe get reimbursed by the US government," he said.

title: Centre Notifies Order To Strengthen Piped Natural Gas Infrastructure
content: The Order provides a streamlined and time-bound framework for laying and expanding pipelines across the country, addressing delays in approvals and access to land, and enabling faster development of natural gas infrastructure, including in residential areas.

title: Gujarat Assembly Passes Uniform Civil Code Bil, Becomes 2nd State To Do So
content: The bill, which proposes a common legal framework to govern marriage, divorce, succession and live-in relationships irrespective of religion, was passed with majority voice vote as opposition Congress and Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) did not approve it.

title: Amid Trump's Pause, US To Send Thousands More Troops To Middle East: Report
content: The Pentagon is expected to send thousands of soldiers from the army's elite 82nd Airborne Division to the Middle East, two people familiar with the matter told

title: Delhi Wasn't World's Most Polluted City Last Year, This Indian Town Was
content: At the country level, Pakistan ranked as the world's most polluted nation, followed by Bangladesh and Tajikistan.

title: 'Trap Closing Around Trump': Ex-White House Adviser On Iran War
content: "Donald Trump has not ordered the ships carrying US Marines to reverse course," US national security expert Professor Robert Pepe said

title: T.N. election 2026: Once a Chief Minister’s citadel, Srirangam constituency yearns for more infrastructure development
content: With a major temple town in its midst and rapid urbanisation of its rural segments, the civic infrastructure in the constituency has been stretched to its limits in recent years

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Poll authorities accept V.D. Satheesan’s nomination papers, reject LDF’s complaint
content: The Returning Officer for the Paravur constituency dismissed the complaint lodged by LDF candidate E.T. Taison, alleging that Mr. Satheesan had failed to disclose his income as a lawyer, despite adding the title of advocate to his name.

title: Centre intensifies regulatory surveillance over GLP-1 weight loss drugs
content: India’s drugs controller, in collaboration with State regulators, has initiated a series of targeted actions to curb possible malpractices across the pharmaceutical supply chain and prevent unauthorised sales and use

title: Kerala Assembly Elections 2026: Anvar, Firos have four namesake rivals against them
content: However, the number of candidates may come down further as the last date for withdrawing the nominations approaches.

title: T.N. election 2026: Despite development measures, gaps in basic civic infrastructure remain unresolved in Alandur constituency
content: Alandur lacks basic amenities such as piped drinking water supply and underground drainage in some areas; sources in the DMK contend that the government has improved civic infrastructure

title: Puducherry elections 2026: Upset VCK exits DMK-Congress alliance, decides to contest alone
content: VCK leader Thol. Thirumavalavan expresses dissatisfaction with the seat-sharing arrangement, declaring the party’s intent to run independently in three constituencies

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: DMDK allotted 10 seats, DMK likely to contest in 175 seats
content: DMDK allocated 10 seats in SPA; Makkal Needhi Maiam founder Kamal Haasan opted out of the poll fray but extended full support to the DMK-led SPA

title: T.N. CM Stalin calls for constitutional safeguards to retain current share of States’ representation in delimitation
content: The current proportional representation of States should not be disturbed under any circumstances, says Chief Minister; Statement comes in the wake of reports that 2011 Census may be used for women’s reservation in Parliament and Legislative Assemblies

title: Why is SIR so bumpy in West Bengal when other States had smooth ride, asks Supreme Court
content: Justice Joymalya Bagchi observes there is no point in saying West Bengal has “thrown up a unique problem”

title: What will be the fallout of West Asia war on economy, Opposition asks government
content: We have the fastest-falling currency, says Congress MP, countering BJP’s ‘fastest-growing economy’ claim

title: India an ‘essential’ U.S. partner in Indo-Pacific, its rise is good for American interests, says top Pentagon official
content: U.S. Assistant Secretary Elbridge Colby says India and U.S. can live with their differences; makes no mention of Quad

title: Transgender Bill passed by voice vote in Lok Sabha amid walkout by Opposition MPs
content: NDA MPs hail Bill, say it protects transgender community from ‘infiltrators’ wanting to misuse self-identification to corner benefits

title: Tamil Nadu Assembly election 2026: AIADMK releases manifesto; assures free refrigerators to women ration card-holders
content: The distribution of free refrigerators to women beneficiaries of the PDS, the revision of electricity tariff on common facilities in multi-storey apartments, and the increase in horizontal reservation for government school students in admission to the medical courses from 7.5% to 10.5% are among the highlights of the manifesto

title: T.N. election 2026: Kurinjipadi constituency voters want non-polluting, agro-based industrial boost
content: Minister MRK Panneerselvam is in the fray aiming for a hat-trick in Kurinjipadi. The DMK-led Democratic Progressive Alliance needs to be aware that the Tamizhaga Vazhvurimai Katchi headed by T. Velmurugan and now delinked from the DMK-led alliance, is capable of eating into the votes of the DMK in areas like Kurinjipadi and Kullanchavadi where it has significant presence

title: Gujarat CM invokes Sanatan values, Rigveda as UCC Bill tabled in Assembly
content: The Bill was tabled by Chief Minister Bhupendra Patel a week after a State-appointed panel submitted its final report on implementation of the UCC; the Bill proposes a common framework for marriage, succession and live-in relationships

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: Reviving powerloom sector, addressing farmers’ needs key demands in Sulur constituency
content: Poor solid waste management by the local bodies, discharge of effluents from industries and sewage from human habitations into River Noyyal and encroachments of water bodies are the other major concerns

title: I-PAC raid: Supreme Court poses question to West Bengal CM
content: Court’s query comes in reaction to submissions made by both Ms. Banerjee and State of West Bengal that Directorate of Enforcement (ED) cannot move Supreme Court directly under Article 32 of Constitution, “crying” violation of its fundamental rights.

title: Supreme Court flags long-term bias against women in the armed forces
content: The Bench headed by CJI Surya Kant upheld permanent commission and consequent pensionary benefits for batches of women officers in the Army, the Air Force and the Navy

title: West Asia crisis: India’s foreign policy is ‘compromised’, considered a ‘universal joke’, says Rahul Gandhi
content: Slams PM for comparing West Asia crisis to COVID-19 pandemic; to miss all-party meet on West Asia due to poll events in Kerala; attacks Centre over reports that Pakistan may mediate between Iran, U.S.

title: Odisha’s last remaining top Maoist leader surrenders
content: With this surrender, the number of active Left Wing Extremists in Odisha has come down to single digits, says Sanjeeb Panda, chief of anti-Maoist operation in the State

title: T.N. Assembly election: Tiruttani constituency residents seek more support to improve their livelihood
content: Farmers, who recently set up a producer organisation and started growing millets, complain that they still do not have machinery needed to process the crop. Residents say work to lay a second access road to Subramaniaswami Temple is yet to be completed, with land acquisition still under way

title: Anganwadi workers call off protest after Karnataka government agrees to fulfil demands
content: Anganwadi workers called off their protest on Tuesday evening after the government reportedly promised to fulfill their demands, including the release of gratuity of about ₹183 crore to retired anganwadi workers.

title: JICA funds Bengaluru Metro phase 3
content: The project is scheduled to be completed by January 2032, with invitations for consulting services expected to be issued in April 2026. The tender announcement for the initial procurement package for civil works for the viaduct portion is planned for May 2026.

title: Madras HC dismisses  dismisses S.P. Velumani’s petition against I-T assessment order on 2016 Assembly poll expenses
content: Justice C. Saravanan rejects the 2023 writ petition filed against an assessment order passed in 2022 by treating the ₹7 crore as unexplained expenditure

title: T.N. Assembly election 2026: Brahmin faces of Naam Tamilar Katchi in electoral fray, a shift from the past
content: Faced with stereotypes in DMK and Periyarite political circles, Seeman’s NTK has become a refuge for Brahmins who want to work for Tamil nationalism in TN

title: When an explosion was triggered on the map of India to protest imposition of Hindi
content: Cadres of the Tamil Viduthalai Padai triggered the bomb blast in the Botanical Garden, Udhagamandalam, to press their demand for Tamil Eelam and against the imposition of Hindi

title: Aditya Birla Group-led consortium acquires Royal Challengers Bengaluru in a $1.76 billion deal
content: It has been sold to a consortium comprising Aditya Birla Group, The Times of India Group, Bolt Ventures, and Blackstone’s perpetual private equity strategy, BXPE in an all-cash deal worth $1.76 billion

title: Panic buying led to ‘no stock’ boards; no shortage of petrol, diesel or LPG in Telangana: Civil Supplies dept
content: Panic buying leading to ‘no stock’ boards; Hyderabad Police Commissioner too says there is no fuel shortage

title: Uproar after statues of Kakori martyrs razed in Shahjahanpur; Congress threatens mass protest
content: The statues of freedom fighters Ram Prasad Bismil, Ashfaqulla Khan and Roshan Singh were allegedly demolished during a road beautification work

title: Chandigarh at 75: ‘It’s a testament to modern India’s vision of planned development,’ says Governor Kataria
content: Kataria appreciated the role of the administration in maintaining the city’s unique character through planned growth, cleanliness, green spaces and improved civic infrastructure

title: Discharge of untreated water into sea has caused marine pollution: Shiv Sena (UBT) leader
content: BMC Additional Municipal Commissioner said the city will be able to ensure 100% treatment of sewage before it is discharged into the sea

title: CAG empanelled auditors to audit urban local bodies (ULBs): Bihar Deputy CM Vijay Sinha
content: The CAG empanelled auditors will conduct auditing of all the Urban local bodies (ULBs) that include municipal corporations, municipal councils and nagar panchayats

title: This day in 1977: How Morarji Desai became India’s first non-Congress PM

title: SC: SIR in many states, but Bengal alone has so many issues with it
content: the suprem court observes that while SIR has been conducted smoothly in other states, it is west Bengal that has generated a spate of litigation relating to electoral roll revision . there are states - Gujarat, Tamil Nadu and Uttar Pradesh - where the deletion rate is much higher," a bench of CJI Surya Kant and Justice Joymalya Bagchi said .

title: House advances boxing-reform act, but questions remain
content: the bill would weaken key provisions of existing federal regulations . critics say the bill could wind up removing some boxer protections . the bill now heads to the Senate, and if it passes there, combined with white's close ties to president Donald Trump, it has a strong chance to become law .

title: Men's tournament first bets: Picks to make now for the next two rounds
content: the men's basketball tournament field has been whittled down to just 16 teams . three of the four no. 1 seeds ( Duke , Arizona and Michigan ) are still in competition . top-seeded Florida got knocked out after a single-point victory by Iowa .

title: Welcome to WNBA chaos: Breaking down a chock-full offseason
content: the WNBA and women's national basketball players association agree to a new collective bargaining agreement . the agreement gives way to what both sides have described as a "transformational" deal . despite months of negotiations to reach this point, the previous CBA expired in October .

title: Marlins' two-foot 'Machete' leads 2026 new ballpark foods
content: the Miami Marlins are serving up the "Machete" at home games . the tortilla is griddled on the flat top with melted mozzarella and Oaxaca cheese, carne asada, salsa verde and cilantro . this season's season is no different with new creations making headlines .

title: Bills' massive bison statues anchor Highmark Stadium's Family Circle in new renderings
content: the bison statues and the Family Circle are a part of an area that will be a first welcome to the new stadium . the installation will feature three stainless steel bison -- a bull, cow and calf -- modeled after the American bison .

title: From Dowman to Messi: Picking the world's best soccer players at every age
content: the world's best player isn't obvious, and it changes every year, if not every month . there will be plenty of time to debate this, especially because it's a world cup year . if we can convince ourselves of two contradictory truths, we will do whatever we can .

title: What returning production looks like for the 2026 college football season
content: the more continuity and experience you return from last season, the more likely you are to improve . it's still better to return a lot of your production than a little, even if last year's headliner bombed . a combination of injuries, tactical stagnation and disappointing development held back the Tigers .

title: Barnwell on a surprising NFL free agency trend going back to 2013
content: 'the bill Barnwell Show' today, I'll try to answer that question . how often does a team sign a significant free agent, look back and say that it spent wisely? how often do premium free agents really work out?

title: Ranking the best possible Stanley Cup playoff first-round matchups
content: if things stay the way they are right now, we will have a ton of turnover from last season . the Buffalo Sabres, Pittsburgh Penguins, Columbus Blue Jackets, Boston Bruins, Detroit Red Wings, Anaheim Ducks , Utah Mammoth and Nashville Predators are all ready for the postseason .

title: News: AL East teams make rotation decisions
content: the fantasy baseball buzz file aims to provide fantasy managers with the intel they need as news breaks around MLB . both the Boston Red Sox and Tampa Bay Rays delivered unexpected news regarding their rotations on Tuesday . it's an unexpected setback for a pitcher potentially set to take a big step forward with the team's IL .

title: Ranking each NHL team's top prospect: Hagens, Iginla, Martone, more
content: every NHL franchise has a prospect pool because of a lack of draft capital . some players are polished and NHL-ready, producing at high rates in other leagues, while others are early in their development with a high ceiling . the player must be under 23 and not an established NHL player .

title: Week 7 Top 25 and how to watch
content: the longhorns have won their past 26 games -- their only loss of the season came in early february . the other biggest mover in the top 10 was Florida, which won two of its three games against then-No. 1 Tennessee last week . there are no more undefeateds in the poll, with Grand Canyon losing its first game last Tuesday .

title: Women's March Madness Day 4 takeaways: How every team reached the Sweet 16
content: the final day of the second round of the 2026 women's NCAA tournament is underway . we're tracking every game as the regional semifinals take shape . the three no. 1 seeds moved on easily, but there was plenty of intrigue elsewhere .

title: Men's March Madness Pain Index: Ranking all 52 NCAA tournament losses
content: a team that walks off the court stunned, jerseys and towels covering tears . a fan base with high expectations and disappointment about the early exit is behind every one of those heartbroken teams . every team's exit is categorized into one of the most devastating .

title: 'A litmus test for the system': $50 million rosters and Nebraska's big challenge
content: the house settlement established a set of rules for paying players . it was intended to prevent the top programs from spending at a pace that made it impossible for the 100-plus other schools to compete . but those top programs have aggressively pursued loopholes to build rosters that are often worth double the money schools are allowed to share directly with their players. now, those rules are facing their first real test .

title: Breaking down the men's hockey tournament: Who will make it to Vegas?
content: the 2025-26 men's college hockey campaign has seen the balance of power firmly entrenched in the Midwest and West . the NCHC and Big Ten dominated the top of the national rankings virtually the entire season . Michigan State, which won the conference's regular-season title, also earned a no. 1 seed .

title: Ready for Opening Day? Here's your guide to the offseason chaos that rocked MLB
content: the new york Mets signed the offseason's no. 1 free agent to a record deal . the two-time reigning champion los Angeles Dodgers sent shock waves through the sport . if you know every signing and trade and still aren't quite sure what to make of the chaos, we've got you covered .
